/tmp/codeql-scratch-6feca9691a3b4459/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/md4c-html.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmd4c-html.so.0 -o libmd4c-html.so.0.5.2 "CMakeFiles/md4c-html.dir/md4c-html.c.o" "CMakeFiles/md4c-html.dir/entity.c.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/tinta/tinta/_codeql_build_dir/_deps/md4c-build/src: libmd4c.so.0.5.2
